Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 26 

MDCD_ICF_IID_LTSS_MOS 

LABEL: Medicaid — Intermediate Care Facility for individuals with intellectual disabilities — LTSS Months 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year where the beneficiary’s monthly level of care 
status code indicated that intermediate care facility for individuals with intellectual disabilities 
(ICF/IID) was required to meet a beneficiary's needs. Medicaid uses this
